overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking along a rainy waterfront promenade in a futuristic city with towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The scene transitions from a calm dock area through a panicking crowd and toward a stairway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock promenade with neon city backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock, passing a seated civilian on the right

notable_agents.action: shirtless civilian sitting on a crate facing the water

entered.detail: wet wooden planks reflecting neon lights
dark water with rippling reflections of city lights
towering futuristic buildings covered in glowing advertisements and holographic displays
blue and black cargo containers stacked near the water edge
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy waterfront dock in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward along wet wooden planks, passing a seated civilian on the right. Towering neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the background under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza approaching crowd gathering

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock toward a gathering crowd in the distance

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian walkway connecting buildings across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera advances along the waterfront promenade, moving away from the dock containers toward a more open plaza area. An overhead bridge structure becomes visible, and the crowd density increases as pedestrians gather ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded dock area during panic event

events.description: crowd suddenly panics and begins running in multiple directions across the dock

agents.ego_description: moving quickly through the panicking crowd as people scatter in various directions

notable_agents.action: crowd of pedestrians running in panic, some falling to the ground

entered.detail: concrete staircase leading up to an elevated walkway entrance

segments.scene_description: The atmosphere shifts dramatically as the crowd suddenly panics and begins running. The camera moves through the chaotic scene with people fleeing in opposing directions, while concrete stairs leading upward become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete platform and stairway entrance to building

events.description: transition from wooden dock to concrete platform area with stairs
character begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the overhead structure

agents.ego_description: following a character up the concrete stairs toward a dark corridor entrance

notable_agents.action: character in gray shirt and dark pants running up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wet concrete surface transitioning from the wooden dock
tall digital display showing pink neon advertisement

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the wooden dock to a concrete platform with stairs leading upward. The camera follows a running character up the stairs, passing a glowing holographic kiosk, moving toward a darker corridor entrance under the overhead walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk waterfront that transforms from a quiet dock into a scene of urban chaos. It begins by gliding along wet wooden planks past a seated civilian, with towering neon skyscrapers looming under an overcast dusk sky. As the camera advances away from the dock containers, the environment opens into a plaza where an overhead bridge appears and the crowd density increases. The atmosphere then shifts dramatically as the pedestrians suddenly panic and flee in opposing directions, pushing the camera forward through the turmoil toward a set of concrete stairs. Finally, the scene transitions from the wooden promenade to a concrete platform, following a running character past a glowing holographic kiosk and up the stairs toward a dark corridor entrance.
